assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 1 (lines 31-33): 'git checkout TC-9005' followed by 'git pull'. The plan explicitly checks out TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 90-103 show the gh pr create command with '--base TC-9005'. Line 107 also states: '--base TC-9005 ensures the PR targets the feature branch, not main'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 2 (lines 37-39): 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 41 explicitly states: 'This creates branch TC-9205 (named after the task issue ID) from the feature branch TC-9005. The task branch TC-9205 is distinct from the target branch TC-9005.'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md 'Pre-Implementation Inspection' section (lines 18-27) lists all three files: (1) 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs -- Inspect to understand the existing migration pattern', (2) 'entity/src/advisory.rs -- Verify that the status column is no longer referenced', (3) 'migration/src/lib.rs -- Inspect to understand how migrations are registered'. This appears before the Branch Operations section.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 70-80 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows Conventional Commits format (type=feat, scope=migration). The footer on line 79 contains 'Implements TC-9205', referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 8: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch, linked via "is incorporated by TC-9005")'. Lines 13-14 in the 'Target Branch Extraction' section: 'The task description contains a Target Branch section with value TC-9005. This is a feature branch (not main), indicating this task is part of a feature-branch workflow.'
